title: Random Mob Sizes
description: configure mobs to spawn in different sizes
body:
![RandomMobSizes](https://i.ibb.co/MfbDTCK/random-mob-sizes-banner.png)

let's you configure mobs to spawn in different sizes


According to the configuration, mobs will spawn with random sizes.
Checkout the [wiki](https://github.com/tristankechlo/RandomMobSizes/wiki) to get more information on how to configure this mod.

if you have any questions about the mod, or you want a few insights about upcoming features:
feel free to join the Discord       link
